top_signals.title: Zillow, Rocket to Face August FTC Trial Over Rental-Listing Deal
top_signals.summary: Zillow Group Inc. and Rocket Companies Inc.’s Redfin are headed to trial next month in the US Federal Trade Commission’s challenge to an apartment-listing partnership, after a judge in Virginia declined a government request to decide the case early.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Crypto VC Paradigm launches $1.2 billion AI fund as it broadens beyond digital assets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pentagon to explore cheaper replacements for the MQ-9 Reaper
top_signals.summary: The Massed Modular Aircraft project aims to develop a drone that can operate in such large numbers that it can absorb losses and still overwhelm defenses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says this 'self-help story' is a long-term buy after a 25% pullback
top_signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

top_signals.title: Accenture confirms breach after hacker offers stolen data for sale
top_signals.summary: IT services giant Accenture has confirmed it suffered a security breach after a threat actor claimed to have stolen 35 GB of source code and other data from the company. [...]

top_signals.title: BMP Maritime Security updated with new guidance on managing activism at sea
top_signals.summary: The latest edition of BMP Maritime Security (BMP MS) has been updated to include a new section dedicated to managing incidents involving activist boardings of ships and offshore installations. The guidance reflects the growing need for vessel operators and crews to be prepared for organised protest activity at sea. Activist groups have a history of ...
